title: Integrations
subtitle: Install external coding agents and assistants, then point them at your local Atomic Chat models with one click.
serverSectionDesc: Run an OpenAI-compatible server for your local models, then point the agents below at it.
codingAgentsDesc: Coding assistants that can read, modify, and execute code in your projects.
assistantsDesc: AI assistants that help with everyday tasks.
editorsDesc: Use your local Atomic Chat models directly inside VS Code, JetBrains, and Xcode.
serverNotRunningHint: Start the local server above first so {{name}} can reach your models.
customPathHint: Point at the agent's executable if it's installed in a non-standard location that auto-detection misses. This only affects the Installed status here.
noRunningModelToast: No model is running. Load a model in a chat first, then enable {{name}}.

toast.serverStartingDesc: Preparing the Atomic Chat server for {{name}}
toast.configuredDesc: {{name}} now points at your local server — opening a terminal.
toast.copyFailed: Couldn't copy settings to the clipboard
toast.editorLaunchedDesc: Finish setup inside {{name}} using the copied connection settings.
